utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items requested in the final format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details:
- health_coverage: The format requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan lists physical_health (€105/month) and mental_health (€60/month). It also lists alternative_medicine without explicit cost, but that is an extra; the required physical and mental are specified with costs. Therefore fully specified.
- property_coverage: The format requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan instead provides professional_liability (€20/month), equipment_insurance (€60/month), and technology_protection_add_on (€40/month). It does not include home/contents insurance; thus not fully specified according to the required item.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Plan provides travel_insurance (€50/month) and an add-on (€80/month). Costs are present; so fully specified.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. The items listed describe services but do not include their separate costs (they reference features, not explicit priced services beyond earlier line items). Since the format asks for services with costs, and no costs are given for these services, this is not fully specified.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan gives €415/month and €4,980/year; fully specified.
Thus, fully specified items: health_coverage, travel_coverage, total_budget = 3 of 5.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Map each item in the assistant’s final coverage plan to the exact corresponding option name in the ground-truth and return its rating. Items present: InsurePlus Standard Plan (physical health) -> primary_health_coverage.physical_health rating 10; InsurePlus Standard Plan (mental health) -> primary_health_coverage.mental_health rating 7; InsurePlus Standard Coverage (equipment/home content) -> property_protection.home_content rating 10; Technology Protection add-on -> property_enhancement_services rating 8; InsurePlus Standard Plan (travel insurance) -> mobility_coverage.travel_insurance rating 10; Adventure Travel Coverage add-on -> travel_enhancement_services rating 10; Premium Insurance Membership -> general_services rating 6. The alternative medicine line is not a specific rated option, so no mapping.
